name: onipin
description: OniPin Desktop Extension enables Claude to connect with businesses through the OniPin protocol. Discover businesses using an onp_ PIN, browse catalogs, chat with AI or human agents, request appointments, and create purchase requests through the public OniPin API.
long_description: OniPin Desktop Extension enables Claude to connect with businesses through the OniPin protocol. Discover businesses using an onp_ PIN, browse catalogs, chat with AI or human agents, request appointments, and create purchase requests through the public OniPin API (default https://onnivers.store). This is a thin local MCP client only — it does not include the OniPin platform source code. No API token is required; pass the business pin (onp_…) in the conversation.

tools.name: discover_from_url
tools.description: Resolve an OniPin pin from a website URL

tools.name: business_lookup
tools.description: Look up a business by pin

prompts.name: atender_como_cliente
prompts.description: Act as the customer's agent toward a business
prompts.text: Act as my representative with OniPin business pin {{pin}}. Goal: {{objetivo}}. Use business_lookup, catalog_list, chat_send, booking_create or order_create as needed, and chat_read before concluding.

base_url.title: OniPin API base URL
base_url.description: Public OniPin API origin (default https://onnivers.store). No API token required. Pass the business onp_ PIN in the chat with Claude, not in this setting.
